generatedFrom.redistributionPolicy: Only project-authored synopses, public section locators, and cryptographic hashes are committed. Recovered PDFs and full text extractions remain outside Git.

scope.completionRule: CONF-003 remains open until every selected row in all nine mandatory Class C families has one or more anchored, deduplicated nested clauses.

interpretation.normativeForce: Explicit RFC-style terms, formal grammar/tables, declared error conditions, and the WML specification implicit-MUST convention are classified separately.
interpretation.deduplication: One clause may map to multiple selected SCR parents when a single normative behavior is cross-referenced by those features.
interpretation.implementationAssessment: Parent implementation statuses are snapshots from the family SCR ledgers. Clause status remains not-assessed until direct source-derived fixture evidence is reviewed.
